title: Admissions Open for 2025-26 Academic Year
excerpt: Applications are now being accepted for classes 8 through Plus Two for the upcoming academic year.
content: St. Mary's Higher Secondary School, Murickassery invites applications for the 2025-26 academic year. We offer programs in Science, Commerce, and Humanities streams.

title: Annual Science Exhibition 2025
excerpt: Students showcased innovative projects at the annual science exhibition, demonstrating creativity and scientific thinking.
content: The annual Science Exhibition was held on February 20th with over 50 student projects on display.

title: SSLC & HSE Board Exam Results — Outstanding Performance
excerpt: SMHSS students achieved exceptional results in the 2025 board examinations with multiple top rankers.
content: We are proud to announce outstanding results in the 2025 board examinations.

title: Inter-School Sports Tournament
excerpt: Our school hosted the annual inter-school sports tournament with participation from 20 schools.
content: The Inter-School Sports Tournament was a grand success with teams from across the district.

title: Teacher's Day Celebration
excerpt: Students organized a heartwarming celebration honoring our dedicated teachers.
content: Teacher's Day was celebrated with enthusiasm and gratitude by all students.

title: New Smart Classroom Initiative
excerpt: SMHSS launches state-of-the-art smart classrooms equipped with interactive digital learning tools.
content: As part of our digital transformation journey, we have installed smart classroom technology.
